text:
infrastructure construction and development of social affairs. Concurrently, it cuts the connection of mid- and long-term construc-
                                                                                                                     tion with basic money from the sources, lowering the systematic
                                                                                                                     risks of financial industry. Development-oriented finance insists on
                                                                                                                     the principle of operation as “government entrance, financial sup-
                                                                                                                     port, and market exit”. Government entrance is that development-
                                                                                                                     oriented finance actively sheds light on the area where market
                                                                                                                     function is not working well, and gives play of the government’s
                                                                                                                     organization advantages. Financial support is to implement the idea
                                                                                                                     of development-oriented finance, raise capital to promote credit con-
                                                                                                                     struction, improve the construction of the legal system, cash flow,
                                                                                                                     credit, and project, and at last form mature projects and market
                                                                                                                     institutions which meet the regulation of commercial operation and
                                                                                                                     the requirements of financial risk management. Market exit is that
                                                                                                                     development-oriented finance adjusts its strategy according to the
                                                                                                                     change of situations.
